svg.title: Next-gen AI data factory – Horizon 3 blueprint v12
svg.text: ask in plain language · get grounded, cited answers
humans no longer build the platform –
they direct it, consume it, certify it
direct the fleet · pair with agents · certify what they propose
AGENTIC INFRASTRUCTURE – THE CONTROL PLANE · HOSTING · ORCHESTRATION · IDENTITY
converse with users · pair with the platform team on demand
run continuously – evolve, maintain, heal the platform
agents run on the tooling – and generate & maintain it themselves
ENTERPRISE CONTEXT LAYER – SHARED MEANING FOR EVERY ANSWER
maps every question – and every concept – to the right product
DATA & AI PRODUCTS – THE LOGICAL LAYER · DEFINED BY CONTRACT, NOT LOCATION
each product: explicit contract + SLOs · domain-owned · ontology-mapped
any product · any port – protocol-agnostic serving
PHYSICAL DATA LAYER – WHERE THE REAL DATA LIVES
every answer grounded in approved meaning
context updates proposed by agents – certified at the gate
